about.title: About Us
about.tagline: Premium grooming services in the heart of the city. We believe a great haircut changes everything.
about.storyParagraph1: Founded with a passion for the craft, {shop} was built to bring old-world barbering tradition into the modern age. Every cut, every shave, every trim is performed with precision and care by our team of experienced professionals.
about.storyParagraph2: We take pride in creating an experience — not just a haircut. From the moment you walk through our doors to the moment you leave, your satisfaction is our top priority.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains how {shop} ("we") collects and uses personal data when you use this online booking application. When the application runs as a rented, managed instance, the barbershop operating it is the data controller and the platform operator processes data on its behalf (LGPD/GDPR).
privacy.dataAccount: Account and booking details you provide: name, email address, phone number and, optionally, date of birth.
privacy.dataUsage: Appointment history, waitlist entries and reviews you create while using the service.
privacy.dataTechnical: Technical data needed to run the app: an authentication cookie (session-only by default, longer-lived if you choose "Remember me"), your language preference and your light/dark theme preference.
privacy.purposeBody: To operate the schedule (create, change and cancel appointments), send booking reminders and waitlist notifications by email, keep your account secure, and show the shop's staff the information they need to serve you. We do not sell personal data and we do not use it for third-party advertising.
privacy.sharingBody: The shop's administrators and professionals see the booking details required to run the schedule. Data is not shared with anyone else, except when required by law.
privacy.rightsBody: You may request access, correction or deletion of your personal data at any time. Write to {email} and we will respond as soon as possible. Deleting your account removes your personal data; past appointments may be kept in anonymised form for the shop's records.
privacy.retentionBody: Data is kept only while your account is active or while the shop needs it to operate. Demonstration environments may be reset at any time, which deletes all data.
privacy.changesBody: We may update this policy from time to time; the current version is always published on this page. Questions: {email}.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using this application you agree to these terms. If you are using a rented, managed instance operated for a specific barbershop, the written service agreement for that instance prevails over these general terms.
terms.serviceBody: {shop} provides online appointment booking for barbershop services: browsing services and professionals, booking, rescheduling and cancelling appointments, joining waitlists and leaving post-appointment reviews.
terms.accountsBody: You are responsible for the accuracy of the information you provide and for keeping your credentials safe. Accounts used fraudulently or abusively may be suspended.
terms.bookingsBody: Appointments are subject to real availability. Please cancel or reschedule in advance whenever possible; repeated no-shows may limit your ability to book.
terms.acceptableBody: You agree not to misuse the application — including attempting to access other people's data, disrupting the service, or submitting false bookings or abusive reviews.
terms.demoBody: This instance may be a demonstration environment published as a professional portfolio. It is provided "as is", with no availability guarantee, and its data may be reset at any time. Do not enter real personal data in a demonstration environment.
terms.liabilityBody: To the maximum extent permitted by law, the service is provided without warranties of any kind and the operator is not liable for indirect damages arising from its use.
terms.changesBody: These terms may be updated; the current version is always available on this page. Questions: {email}.
